text: So I temporarily fix this issue by just adding the formulas manually. So we are having problem here and we had problem with the formula in column J which is a xlookup formula. I just typed it. It's exactly the same as we generally have automatically. And once that was done I also need to manually add a VLOOKUP formula here because. The last one I'm just trying to go out here you will see there are some blank rows because those are fba. Either they're a BA or they are not in that report. So whatever we have on that report you will see the data for it. And once that's added it automatically gets added to because of the formula from Comprehensive report the ABM SNH shows up but it should be negative. Oh yeah, okay. So then it got added up and then now you will see a BMS and age percentage and also you will see the VM expenses for the items that we did a bm. Alright, so now you can do your analysis on this one. Give me a report. Thank you.
